profile.name: Dokka Vijay
profile.title: AI Engineer
profile.subtitle: NLP | LLMs | RAG Pipelines | Deep Learning
profile.bio: AI Engineer from Andhra Pradesh, India, specializing in end-to-end ML pipelines, LLM integration, and RAG-based applications. Currently pursuing MCA at Vignana's Lara Institute.

education.institute: Vignana's Lara Institute of Technology & Science

projects.name: Menina AI
projects.description: A next-gen AI development partner that thinks, plans, and codes alongside you. Goes beyond code generation to become a real developing partner.

features.title: Sandbox Environment
features.desc: Runs updated code safely in isolated sandbox. Review results before applying.

features.title: Prompt Enhancer
features.desc: Built-in prompt enhancer that suggests corrections before sending.

features.title: Reference Projects
features.desc: Shows matching reference projects for better understanding.

features.title: Easy Installation
features.desc: One-click install, auto-configures everything with user permissions.

features.title: Project Map
features.desc: Structural visual representation map of the entire project.

features.title: Low Hallucination
features.desc: Not just code generation - a real developing partner with less hallucination.

features.title: End-to-End Dev
features.desc: Shows pain points and suggests corrections or upgrades on every prompt.

features.title: Easy to Use
features.desc: Intuitive UI designed to be easy to use and adopt from day one.

features.title: AI Assistant
features.desc: Built-in AI assistant that helps with everything inside the tool.

features.title: Knowledge Graph
features.desc: Builds a knowledge graph about user and project. Fixes failing sections in background.

projects.name: Affusion-X
projects.description: End-to-end AI system converting text into expressive audio with multilingual and emotion-conditioned synthesis. Built complete workflow with deployment via Streamlit.

projects.name: Fake News Detection
projects.description: Full-stack AI app that ingests live URLs, extracts multimodal content (text and images), and performs fake news classification with interactive feedback.
